extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated (April 14, 2026)
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Date Change – Glen Ullin Station 6 Bison XP ESD Testing and Elbow Replacement – from original dates of 4/17 through 4/19 to new dates of 4/20 through 4/22
- Add- Zeeland Station 8 Spring Outage and Borescope on 4/24
- Add – St Anthony Station 7 Regulator and Reliefs Inspection on 4/25
- Date Change – Manning Station 5 Bison XP ESD Testing - from original date of 4/23 to new date of 4/28 through 4/30
- Date Change – Clark Station 10 TSA Automation Upgrade outage – from original dates of 4/24 through 5/22 to new dates of 5/6 through 6/5
- Remove – Trimont Station 13 Exhaust Plenum Recoat on 5/25 through 5/29
- Remove – Wetonka Station 9 Spring Outage on 6/2 through 6/3

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance:
2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 041426 (003).pdf
